name: Chestnut Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast and shell the chestnuts.
2. In a large pot, heat the oil and sauté the onion, carrot, and celery. Add the broth, sugar, bay leaf, basil, marjoram, and chestnuts. Simmer until the chestnuts are tender, about 25 minutes. Remove and discard the bay leaf. Carefully transfer to a food processor or blender and puree the mixture. Return to the pot and stir in the evaporated milk. Bring to a boil; add the Marsala wine, sherry, or chicken broth. Season to taste with salt and pepper. Serve hot or cold.
